title: Zakovat Warm-up #1
author: Artificial Teacher
description: Beginner foydalanuvchilar uchun yengil mantiqiy grammar savoli.

content.savol: Choose the correct form: She ___ coffee every morning.
content.izoh: Third person singular in Present Simple needs -s.

title: Zakovat Sprint #2
author: Artificial Teacher
description: Translation logic va tense tanlashni sinaydi.

content.izoh: Current ongoing action needs Present Continuous.

title: Zakovat Pro Challenge
author: Artificial Teacher
description: IELTS style inference savoli va grammar trap.

content.savol: Which sentence is the most natural academic option?
variantlar: Many student is think this is useful.
Many students think this approach is effective.
Many students is thinking this approach effective.
Many student think this is effectiveness.
content.javob: Many students think this approach is effective.
content.izoh: Plural subject, correct verb form and natural academic phrasing are required.

content.savol: If the report was submitted before review and no reviewer approved it, what is definitely true?
content.izoh: Submission alone does not imply approval.
